privileged_info_summary: The task sets up a monitoring stack with three services: Prometheus (v2.53.0), Grafana (11.0.0), and Node Exporter (v1.8.1) in the /home/ga/monitoring-stack directory. All services are based on official Docker Hub images and expose the correct ports (Prometheus: 9090, Grafana: 3000, Node Exporter: 9100). The task requires converting individual 'docker run' commands into a valid docker-compose.yml file. All metadata claims regarding service names, ports, image versions, and project directory have been independently verified against setup scripts and Docker Hub registries.
